span.p: Should this container have a CPU limit?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
First: a MEMORY limit is mandatory either way
this tree is only about the CPU limit

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Is the workload in a hard multi-tenant
or chargeback/quota boundary?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Set a CPU limit:
predictable cap, prevents one tenant
starving others; accept possible throttling

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Prefer NO CPU limit:
CPU throttling is silent and shows up as
p99 latency spikes; rely on requests + headroom

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
